preset_description: Dark = identity signal. Visual language expresses who the user is. Validator gets authority and weight (heavy dark). Mover gets minimal light with one dark CTA punch. Explorer gets all-neutral — open, spacious, no urgency.

accent_tokens._note: Brand primary CTA color. Global — not per-preset. Two variants: button on a light/neutral section vs. on a dark section.

beats.name: Orientation
beats.rationale: Anchors trial users immediately: you've experienced the product, here's why it's time to commit. Sets a direct, action-oriented frame fitting the Mover archetype.

beats.name: Value
beats.rationale: Movers need a fast, clear articulation of what they gain by upgrading. Reinforces the outcomes they've already glimpsed during their trial, keeping momentum toward decision.

beats.name: Evidence
beats.rationale: Required by decision-stage rules. Provides concrete metrics and proof points that validate the value claims, giving trial users the rational justification they need to convert.

beats.name: Decision
beats.rationale: Required by decision-stage rules. Presents pricing and plan comparison so trial users can frame their final choice with clarity and confidence.

beats.name: Conversion
beats.rationale: Placed immediately before Recovery per rules. Direct CTA prompting the purchase commitment — no hesitation, aligned with the Mover's preference for a fast path to action.

beats.name: Recovery
beats.rationale: Always last. Catches any remaining hesitation with secondary paths such as extending the trial, contacting sales, or exploring documentation.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.rationale: Global navigation — wayfinding and persistent CTA for the session.

sections.name: Hero
sections.rationale: Anchors trial users immediately: you've experienced the product, here's why it's time to commit. Sets a direct, action-oriented frame fitting the Mover archetype.

sections.name: Proof points
sections.rationale: Required by decision-stage rules. Provides concrete metrics and proof points that validate the value claims, giving trial users the rational justification they need to convert.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.rationale: Required by decision-stage rules. Presents pricing and plan comparison so trial users can frame their final choice with clarity and confidence.

sections.name: CTA
sections.rationale: Placed immediately before Recovery per rules. Direct CTA prompting the purchase commitment — no hesitation, aligned with the Mover's preference for a fast path to action.

sections.name: Footer
sections.rationale: Page close — brand mark, minimal navigation, and legal.

page.reasoning: minimal variant for conversion-focused pages — strip nav_links, keep logo and single CTA only. At decision stage, Mover archetype needs frictionless navigation toward purchase.
Mover variant suppresses subhead and cta_secondary — one message, one action. Organic context and decision-stage urgency demand focused clarity without secondary options.

slots.headline: You've seen it work. Now own it.
slots.subhead: One payment. Lifetime access. Ship intent-aware UI from day one.
slots.trust_signal: No subscription. No lock-in. Yours forever.

page.reasoning: Mover variant suppresses sources and headline; pure metric impact. 3-stat is the preferred default for rapid trust-building without cognitive load.

stats.label: From install to operational intelligence layer
Components fully specified — zero manual variant work
Resolution dimensions per component, decided automatically

page.reasoning: Mover variant strips description; price and CTA only. Highlighted variant for recommended plan drives immediate decision-making aligned with purchase intent.

slots.description: The full intelligence layer. Yours forever — no subscription, no runtime dependency.
features: Three palette presets, editable token dashboard
Bring your own Anthropic API key

page.reasoning: Mover variant: strong headline, single CTA, no subhead. Centered layout with unified messaging removes friction at terminal conversion moment.

slots.headline: Your design system is ready. Make it intelligent.
slots.subhead: One payment. Lives in your codebase. No vendor dependency.
slots.trust_signal: Lifetime access. Fork it, extend it, own it.

page.reasoning: with-cta variant recaptures departing users on key conversion pages — use on pricing and signup flows. Decision-stage Mover requires last-touch recovery CTA.
